'''âs-t-r''' ('''kasatar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quiff|quiff]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quiff|quiff]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-t-r
|-
! Lemma
| kasatar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisatar|thisatar]] || [[word:jisatar|jisatar]] || [[word:shisatar|shisatar]] || [[word:kisatar|kisatar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusatar|thuthusatar]] || [[word:jujusatar|jujusatar]] || [[word:shushusatar|shushusatar]] || [[word:kukusatar|kukusatar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusatar|thusatar]] || [[word:jusatar|jusatar]] || [[word:shusatar|shusatar]] || [[word:kusatar|kusatar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusatar|thusatar]] || [[word:jusatar|jusatar]] || [[word:shusatar|shusatar]] || [[word:kusatar|kusatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesatar|thesatar]] || [[word:jesatar|jesatar]] || [[word:shesatar|shesatar]] || [[word:kesatar|kesatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosatar|thothosatar]] || [[word:jojosatar|jojosatar]] || [[word:shoshosatar|shoshosatar]] || [[word:kokosatar|kokosatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosatar|thosatar]] || [[word:josatar|josatar]] || [[word:shosatar|shosatar]] || [[word:kosatar|kosatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosatar|thosatar]] || [[word:josatar|josatar]] || [[word:shosatar|shosatar]] || [[word:kosatar|kosatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsatar|thĂŠsatar]] || [[word:jĂŠsatar|jĂŠsatar]] || [[word:shĂŠsatar|shĂŠsatar]] || [[word:kĂŠsatar|kĂŠsatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasatar|thathasatar]] || [[word:jajasatar|jajasatar]] || [[word:shashasatar|shashasatar]] || [[word:kakasatar|kakasatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasatar|thasatar]] || [[word:jasatar|jasatar]] || [[word:shasatar|shasatar]] || [[word:kasatar|kasatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasatar|thasatar]] || [[word:jasatar|jasatar]] || [[word:shasatar|shasatar]] || [[word:kasatar|kasatar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasatar|shasatar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasatar|goshasatar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasatar|gokishasatar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasatarnĂŒ|shasatarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasatarnknĂŒ|goshasatarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasatarnĂŒ|gokishasatarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasatarshĂ«|shasatarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasatarnkshĂ«|goshasatarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasatarshĂ«|gokishasatarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasataro|shasataro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasatarnkro|goshasatarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasataro|gokishasataro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasatarmu|shasatarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasatarnkmu|goshasatarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasatarmu|gokishasatarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasatarsher|shasatarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasatarnksher|goshasatarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasatarsher|gokishasatarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasatarng|shasatarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasatarnkng|goshasatarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasatarng|gokishasatarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasatarya|shasatarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasatarnkya|goshasatarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasatarya|gokishasatarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasataryam|shasataryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasatarnkyam|goshasatarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasataryam|gokishasataryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasatarnĂŒshĂ«|shasatarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasatarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasatarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasatarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasatarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasatarnĂŒro|shasatarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasatarnknĂŒro|goshasatarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasatarnĂŒro|gokishasatarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasatarnĂŒmu|shasatarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasatarnknĂŒmu|goshasatarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasatarnĂŒmu|gokishasatarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasatarshĂ«nĂŒ|shasatarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasatarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasatarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasatarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasatarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasatarshĂ«ro|shasatarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasatarnkshĂ«ro|goshasatarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasatarshĂ«ro|gokishasatarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasatarshĂ«mu|shasatarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasatarnkshĂ«mu|goshasatarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasatarshĂ«mu|gokishasatarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasataronĂŒ|shasataronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasatarnkronĂŒ|goshasatarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasataronĂŒ|gokishasataronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasataroshĂ«|shasataroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasatarnkroshĂ«|goshasatarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasataroshĂ«|gokishasataroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasataromu|shasataromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasatarnkromu|goshasatarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasataromu|gokishasataromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasatarmunĂŒ|shasatarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasatarnkmunĂŒ|goshasatarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasatarmunĂŒ|gokishasatarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasatarmushĂ«|shasatarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasatarnkmushĂ«|goshasatarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasatarmushĂ«|gokishasatarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasatarmuro|shasatarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasatarnkmuro|goshasatarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasatarmuro|gokishasatarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
